prompt: Find all 1-hour time slots tomorrow between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM with NO existing events. Write each free slot on its own line in 'HH:MM-HH:MM' format to ~/Desktop/kinbench/209-slots.txt. Fast path: `cerebellum 'calendar availability "$(date -v+1d +%Y-%m-%d)" 9 17 ~/Desktop/kinbench/209-slots.txt'`.
